task_description: Completely rewrite generate_excel.py to create a MiUHC Plans 1-5 premium calculator Excel file. Replace old Diamond/Ruby/Emerald PDF-parsing approach with hardcoded Plans 1-5 premium data, calculator-style input interface with dropdowns and formulas, and two sheets (Konvensional and Syariah).

verification.summary: Script runs without errors, produces valid Kalkulator_Premi_MiUHC.xlsx with 10 XML files inside. Two sheets (Konvensional, Syariah) each with: 3 formulas (age calculation, INDEX/MATCH premium lookup, monthly premium), 2 data validations (gender dropdown, plan dropdown), 1 hyperlink to WhatsApp, 1 merged header cell, 50 premium numeric values in data table. All acceptance criteria met.
